lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭੂਖੇ ਇਕਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਏ ਸਭਸੈ ਤੇਰਾ ਪਾਰਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eik bhookhe ik tripat aghaae sabhasai teraa paaranaa |3|
lines.english: Some are hungry and some are satisfied and satiated, but all lean on Your Support. ||3||
He is woven into the essence of His devotees, through and through.
The True Lord Himself is True, True, True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਆਪੇ ਹੈ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪੁ ਪਸਾਰਣਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape gupat aape hai paragatt apanaa aap pasaaranaa |4|
lines.english: He Himself is hidden, and He Himself is revealed. He Himself spreads Himself out. ||4||
Forever, forever and ever, He shall always exist.
With my mouth, I praise my True Lord King.
He is lofty, inaccessible, unfathomable and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਣੇ ਭਰੇ ਭਰੇ ਭਰਿ ਊਣੇ ਏਹਿ ਚਲਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੇ ਕਾਰਣਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aoone bhare bhare bhar aoone ehi chalat suaamee ke kaaranaa |5|
lines.english: He fills the empty, and empties out the filled; such are the plays and dramas of my Lord and Master. ||5||
With my eyes, I behold the inaccessible and unfathomable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸਗਲ ਉਧਾਰਣਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: karanee sun sun man tan hariaa mere saahib sagal udhaaranaa |6|
lines.english: Listening, listening with my ears, my mind and body are rejuvenated; my Lord and Master saves all. ||6||
All beings and creatures meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਣਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: apanee kudarat aape jaanai nadaree nadar nihaalanaa |7|
lines.english: He Himself knows His creative power; He blesses with His Glance of Grace. ||7||
He created the creation, and gazes upon what He has created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਤਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਚਿਤਾਰਣਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gun gaaveh anahad dhun baanee teh naanak daas chitaaranaa |8|
lines.english: They sing the Glories of the Lord, and the unstruck sound current of His Bani; O Nanak, His slaves remain conscious of Him. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਜਹ ਬੈਸਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa jeh baiseh prabh paase |
lines.english: Where the Saints gather together and sit, God dwells close at hand.
They abide in bliss and joy, beholding the Lord's wondrous play.
Coming and going is all Your wondrous play.
Creating the Creation, You gaze upon Your infinite play.
Listening, listening to Your Glory, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਉਪਾਵਣਹਾਰਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਕੀਆ ਪਾਲਣਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: aap upaae upaavanahaaraa apanaa keea paalanaa |9|
lines.english: Creating the Creation, You Yourself cherish and nurture it. ||9||
Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਇ ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਸਿਮਰਉ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਣਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: due kar jorr simrau din raatee mere suaamee agam apaaranaa |10|
lines.english: With my palms pressed together, I meditate in remembrance on You, day and night, O my inaccessible, infinite Lord and Master. ||10||
Other than You, who else should I praise?
I meditate on the One and Only Lord within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਬੂਝਿ ਜਨ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲਾ ਇਹ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਘਾਲਣਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: hukam boojh jan bhe nihaalaa ih bhagataa kee ghaalanaa |11|
lines.english: Realizing the Hukam of Your Will, Your humble servants are enraptured; this is the achievement of Your devotees. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਤੁਟਹਿ ਸਭਿ ਬੰਧਨ ਇਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਪਰਜਾਲਣਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: gur upades tutteh sabh bandhan ihu bharam mohu parajaalanaa |12|
lines.english: Following the Guru's Teachings, all bonds are broken, and this doubt and emotional attachment are burnt away. ||12||
Following the Guru's Teachings, I meditate on the True Lord within my mind.
Following the Guru's Teachings, I am immersed in the Lord's Love.
Whatever naturally happens, I accept that as good.
Wherever He keeps me, is my place of rest.
Fear has been removed, and darkness has been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸੇ ਬੈਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋ ਬੈਰੀ ਸਭੁ ਏਕੋ ਹੈ ਭਾਲਣਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: binase bair naahee ko bairee sabh eko hai bhaalanaa |13|
lines.english: Hatred is gone - I have no hatred at all; I see the One Lord in all. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਪਏ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਘਾਲਣਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd pe saranaaee jis kaa saa tis ghaalanaa |14|
lines.english: Forsaking self-conceit, I have entered His Sanctuary, and I work for Him. ||14||
Rare are those few, very blessed people, who come into the world,
The all-powerful, primal, detached Lord God has been revealed.
and meditate on their Lord and Master, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਸੋ ਪਰਵਾਰ ਸਧਾਰਣਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: tis jan kai sang tarai sabh koee so paravaar sadhaaranaa |15|
lines.english: Associating with such humble people, all are saved, and their families are saved as well. ||15||
This is the blessing which I have received from my Lord and Master.
Twenty-four hours a day, with my palms pressed together, I meditate on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲੈ ਉਚਾਰਣਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੬॥
lines.translit: naam japee naam sehaj samaavaa naam naanak milai uchaaranaa |16|1|6|
lines.english: I chant the Naam, and through the Naam, I intuitively merge into the Lord; O Nanak, may I be blessed with the Naam, and ever repeat it. ||16||1||6||
Do not be fooled by appearances, you fool.
Maaroo, Fifth Mehl:
This is a false attachment to the expanse of an illusion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਕੋਈ ਰਹਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jag meh koee rehan na paae nihachal ek naaraaeinaa |1|
lines.english: No one can remain in this world; only the One Lord is permanent and unchanging. ||1||
He shall eradicate all emotional attachment, sorrow and doubt.
Seek the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦ ਗਾਇਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eko mantru drirraae aaukhadh sach naam rid gaaeinaa |2|
lines.english: He shall administer the medicine, the Mantra of the One Name. Sing the True Name within your heart. ||2||
